name: hybrid-loops
description: Hybrid loops — design pattern, Claude Code skill, and three working MCP servers (cal_log, metacog, schemaforge) for the typed-substrate places in LLM-judgment systems.

plugins.name: hybrid-loops
plugins.description: Find and design hybrid-loop surfaces in any complex project. Diagnostic-first skill plus three MCP servers: cal_log (per-evaluator prediction logging with hit-rate aggregation), metacog (cognitive-bias auditor over typed substrates), schemaforge (compress+verify schema discovery loop).
